channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lots of dead branches from trees/bushes just left hanging over, 2nd March
item.description:
Its in Hitchlands drive cul d sac also lots of damage to fencing/gate that i thought belonged to the council but i rang them and they told me to report everything to you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hitchlands Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes here could cause serious damage to a vehicle, 2nd March
item.description:
Some very deep potholes on this area of road. Multiple holes in road one after the other. Road is very uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Street, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are multiple potholes along Brookfield Road. It’s terrible. Cars have to swerve to miss them, 2nd March
item.description:
All along Brookfield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34,36, Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on the side of the rd between the entrance to the golf course and the house on the corner of A446., 2nd March
item.description:
The side of this road has multiple hazardous potholes. Speeding traffic on a country road and drivers trying to avoid potholes causes dangerous driving conditions. This road needs to be repaired urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullenwood Manor Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble and gravel left after pot hole repair, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole has been repaired but all of the gravel and rubble from the hole has been left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Court Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50cm wide very deep. Someone has put a cone in it now., 2nd March
item.description:
Causing major problems on corner. Likely to cause an accident due to where it is. People are avoiding it and pulling out around it on a very tight country rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Coberley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole in the road
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Customer reports that all of the drains are full and overflowing at the location and water is running along the gutter/side of the road.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From Gotherington crossroads on main Chelt to Evesham Road going towards the travellers site., 2nd March
item.description:
The hedges have been cut leaving a large amount of rubbish exposed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover loose rattling noise, 2nd March
item.description:
Loose manhole cover A40 by number 404 Gloucester Road, just passed the 94 bus stop... heading towards Gloucester, keeping me up at night...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 396a, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven and wobbly paving slab outside the entrance to the Co-op store. Dangerous for public., 2nd March
item.description:
Outside entrance of Midcounties Co-op at 192 Bath Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR JOB 43118250: sinkhole forming ( E ) 393048 ( N ) 223243
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 2nd March
item.description:
